prompt: Research Bitcoin (BTC) comprehensively: 1) Search for the current BTC price in USD, 2) Retrieve historical price data (all-time high, all-time low, YTD performance), 3) Find expert future price predictions for 2025-2030, 4) Analyze market trends, adoption rate, and regulatory developments affecting BTC price. After gathering all data, compile everything into one structured summary and save it as a file named 'btc_research.json' using the file_save tool with the following JSON format: { "btc_current_price_usd": "...", "all_time_high": "...", "all_time_low": "...", "ytd_performance": "...", "future_predictions": { "2025": "...", "2026": "...", "2027-2030": "..." }, "market_trends": "...", "adoption_rate": "...", "regulatory_developments": "...", "sources": ["..."] }
